name: Resource Watcher
description: Adds a bottom-right resource watcher button that shrinks the game into an always-on-top resource monitor without changing vanilla scripts. Integrates with Dynamic Details resource-source data when that mod is enabled.

sch.name: 资源监视器
sch.description: 添加右下角资源监视按钮，可将游戏缩小成置顶资源监视窗口，不修改原版脚本。启用 Dynamic Details 时会联动资源来源数据。

modsch.name: 资源监视器
modsch.description: 添加右下角资源监视按钮，可将游戏缩小成置顶资源监视窗口，不修改原版脚本。启用 Dynamic Details 时会联动资源来源数据。

en.name: Resource Watcher
en.description: Adds a bottom-right resource watcher button that shrinks the game into an always-on-top resource monitor without changing vanilla scripts. Integrates with Dynamic Details resource-source data when that mod is enabled.

thai.name: ตัวเฝ้าดูทรัพยากร
